title: Custom eggless cakes in Riverstone — for Schofields, Marsden Park, Box Hill
summary:
If you're in Schofields, Marsden Park, or Box Hill and you can't find an eggless custom cake — you stopped looking too soon.

Num Nums opened at Riverstone Shopping Centre in December 2024. 100% eggless, every cake, every time. Not a few options. Every single cake.

Six sizes from 6-inch to 16-inch. 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Any design — photo references accepted.

48-hour minimum notice. That's what fresh baking actually takes. Pickup from Riverstone Shopping Centre, free car park.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: can't find eggless custom cake North West Sydney
